# Nur E Qalbb - Premium Islamic Productivity Suite

Nur E Qalbb is a clean, distraction-free Islamic productivity companion designed to help you nurture your faith, track your daily obligations, and stay spiritually connected.

## Core Features

- [Prayer Timings & Tracker](/prayers): Real-time daily schedule calculation, log checklist, streaks, and a lifetime Qaza recovery tracker.
- [Islamic Calendar](/calendar): Month-wide interactive Hijri calendar grid overlaid with Gregorian dates, allowing custom offsets.
- [Wazeefas & Adhkar](/wazeefahs): Pre-defined Sunnah adhkar presets and custom wazeefah builders.
- [Hadith Database](/hadith): Accessible collections of Hadith books.
- [Quran Tracker](/quran): Immersive reader, Khatm planner, translations, and reading bookmarks.
- [Family Circles](/family): Peer prayer tracking groups.
- [Tasbih Counter](/tasbih): Satisfying digital counter.
- [Platform Stats Dashboard](/admin): Aggregate metrics and city offset controls for administrators.
